user.title: Crestron Audio
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Crestron audio controller. Zones are the same zone names used by your Crestron program (e.g. KITCHEN, DECK, PATIO).

error.no_zones: At least one zone name is required.

abort.already_configured: This Crestron host is already configured.

init.title: Crestron Audio
init.description: Update zones or the reboot port.

error.no_zones: At least one zone name is required.

deprecated_yaml.title: Crestron YAML configuration is deprecated
deprecated_yaml.description: Configuring Crestron via `media_player: platform: crestron` YAML is deprecated. Your YAML zones have been imported into a config entry under Settings → Devices & Services. Remove the `crestron` platform blocks from `configuration.yaml` to clear this warning.
